_comment_1_: Sample watershed.json for the NASCAR diamond pattern.
_comment_2_: Relative inc_file / outflow paths are resolved against this JSON's parent directory,
_comment_3_: so the example runs from any working directory:
_comment_6_: Window is dateless: 'window_start' / 'window_end' are public names defined in
_comment_6b_: outflow.py, evaluated at sidecar-import time -- no env vars needed.
_flow_note_: Full FlowControl literal on every diamond edge — same runtime semantics as the gate_mode='hard' shorthand, but adds a LoggingObserver so per-edge fire / skip / spillway events emit through Python logging.  Switch any field's `type` value to swap strategies (see docs/api_atlas.md#canal-toolkit-primitives).
